nodes.label: C001: Senior High School Student Context
nodes.norm_label: c001: senior high school student context

nodes.label: 1D Cellular Automata model
nodes.rationale: Used for modeling linear progression through stages day-by-day because of lower complexity and suitability for time-series predictions.

nodes.label: 2D Cellular Automata model
nodes.rationale: Considered for visualization but rejected/marked optional for core prediction to avoid unnecessary complexity.

nodes.label: Environmental Weights Rationale
nodes.rationale: Tomato is water-sensitive (0.40 weight). Eggplant has balanced needs (0.35 water, 0.35 soil). Siling Labuyo is drought-tolerant (0.40 sun weight, 0.25 water weight).

nodes.label: Seasonal Modifiers Rationale
nodes.rationale: Modifiers adjust growth rate based on season compatibility: Tomato (Cool=1.0, Hot=0.85, Wet=0.7); Eggplant (Hot=0.9, Cool=0.95); Siling Labuyo (Hot=0.95, Cool=0.9).
